description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs that run only on the master branch. Use the ntwrkguru/pandoc-gitlab-ci Docker image for the afterTheFall_epub job, which executes `pandoc -f latex -t epub afterTheFall.tex -o afterTheFall.epub` and stores the resulting afterTheFall.epub as an artifact. Use the tianon/latex Docker image for the afterTheFall_pdf job, which runs `pdflatex afterTheFall.tex` and stores afterTheFall.pdf as an artifact. Both jobs run in the default stage, have no caches, and are limited to the master branch.
